blogs.title: Nation-State hackers exploit Libraesva Email Security flaw
blogs.summary: A critical zero-day vulnerability in Libraesva Email Security is being actively exploited by nation-state threat actors to gain persistent access to corporate mail servers.
blogs.author: CyberDesk Editorial

blogs.title: SolarWinds fixed a critical RCE flaw in its Web Help Desk
blogs.summary: SolarWinds has released an emergency patch addressing a remote code execution vulnerability (CVE-2026-1234) in its popular Web Help Desk product.
blogs.author: Security Wire

blogs.title: APT41 linked to new supply chain campaign targeting cloud providers
blogs.summary: Researchers have attributed a sophisticated supply chain attack on three major cloud infrastructure vendors to the APT41 group backed by China.
blogs.author: ThreatPost

blogs.title: Ransomware payments hit record $2.3B in 2025
blogs.summary: A new report reveals that total ransomware payments surpassed $2.3 billion in 2025, with healthcare and finance sectors bearing the highest costs.
blogs.author: Intelgenz Research

blogs.title: CISA warns of active exploitation of Cisco IOS XE vulnerability
blogs.summary: The US Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency has added a critical Cisco IOS XE flaw to its known exploited vulnerabilities catalog.
blogs.author: GovSec Report

blogs.title: New infostealer Lumma 2.0 evades EDR solutions with novel techniques
blogs.summary: Security researchers have identified an upgraded version of the Lumma infostealer that employs process hollowing and AMSI bypass to evade endpoint detection.
blogs.author: MalwareBytes Labs

blogs.title: Hackers abuse Google OAuth to maintain access after password reset
blogs.summary: A novel attack technique allows threat actors to maintain persistent access to Google accounts even after victims change their passwords by abusing OAuth token refresh flows.
blogs.author: CloudSec Weekly

news.title: Microsoft patches 147 vulnerabilities in April Patch Tuesday
news.summary: April's Patch Tuesday includes fixes for five zero-days actively exploited in the wild, including a critical CVSS 9.8 vulnerability in Windows LDAP.

news.title: FBI seizes infrastructure tied to RedLine and META infostealer operations
news.summary: A coordinated international law enforcement operation dismantled the infrastructure supporting two prolific infostealer-as-a-service platforms.

news.title: ENISA releases 2026 Threat Landscape report
news.summary: The European Union Agency for Cybersecurity published its annual report highlighting ransomware, supply chain attacks, and AI-driven social engineering as top threats.

news.title: Google TAG warns of zero-day in Qualcomm GPU driver exploited in targeted attacks
news.summary: Google's Threat Analysis Group has disclosed a zero-day vulnerability in Qualcomm GPU drivers being exploited in targeted spyware campaigns against journalists.

news.title: Interpol arrests 41 cybercriminals in Operation Synergia II
news.summary: Operation Synergia II led to the arrest of 41 individuals across 19 countries for roles in ransomware, phishing, and business email compromise schemes.

emerging_threats.title: Ransomware Attack on Banking Sector
emerging_threats.description: A coordinated ransomware campaign leveraging DarkLocker v3 is actively targeting banking institutions across India and the United States. The threat group employs double extortion tactics with initial access via phishing.

emerging_threats.title: Phishing Campaign Targeting Healthcare
emerging_threats.description: PhishNet is running a large-scale spear-phishing campaign targeting NHS email addresses, deploying the MedStealer credential harvester via macro-enabled documents.

emerging_threats.title: DDoS Attack on E-commerce Platforms
emerging_threats.description: StormBreak is conducting massive volumetric DDoS attacks exceeding 900 Gbps against e-commerce infrastructure in Germany and France using their StormBot botnet.

emerging_threats.title: Malware Spread via Mobile Apps
emerging_threats.description: Trojanized Android applications distributed via third-party stores are deploying AppSpy spyware that exfiltrates SMS, contacts, and banking credentials.

emerging_threats.title: Insider Threat in IT Company
emerging_threats.description: A disgruntled employee at a major IT services firm exfiltrated source code and customer PII using authorized access before resignation. The incident is under forensic investigation.

emerging_threats.title: Zero-Day Exploitation in VPN Software
emerging_threats.description: SilentCobra is actively exploiting an unpatched zero-day in a widely used enterprise VPN solution to implant CobraRAT for persistent espionage operations against government targets.

emerging_threats.title: Cryptojacking Campaign on Cloud Infrastructure
emerging_threats.description: CloudMiner is compromising misconfigured Kubernetes clusters to deploy XMRigCloud for Monero mining, causing significant compute cost overruns for victims.

emerging_threats.title: Supply Chain Attack on Open Source Libraries
emerging_threats.description: ChainPoison published malicious npm and PyPI packages mimicking popular open-source libraries to inject backdoors into developer environments worldwide.

emerging_threats.title: BEC Campaign Targeting CFOs
emerging_threats.description: ScamWire is running an AI-powered business email compromise campaign using deepfake voice and email spoofing to impersonate CFOs and authorize fraudulent wire transfers.

emerging_threats.title: Critical Infrastructure Attack in Latin America
emerging_threats.description: GridGhost has deployed VoltWorm targeting industrial control systems at electrical grid operators in Colombia and Mexico, causing temporary outages and safety concerns.

emerging_threats.title: AI-Powered Spear Phishing Surge
emerging_threats.description: NeuralPhish is leveraging generative AI to craft hyper-personalized spear-phishing emails with no linguistic tells, dramatically increasing click-through and credential harvest rates.

emerging_threats.title: Espionage Campaign Targeting Telecom Firms
emerging_threats.description: TeleSnoop is conducting long-term espionage against telecom operators to intercept SMS-based MFA codes and conduct subscriber location tracking.
